commands.review_summary:
The branch adds nullable cwd helpers and routes CLI dotenv, gateway dotenv, runtime dotenv, PATH bootstrap, home-dir resolution, is-main, TUI startup/auth/autocomplete, local-shell behavior, tests, and CI shard mapping through caller-specific deleted-cwd handling.

PR surface: Source +82, Tests +197, Other +1. Total +280 across 17 files.

Reproducibility: yes. source-level. The linked issue gives concrete macOS deleted-cwd steps, and current main plus v2026.6.9 still have bare process.cwd() reads in CLI startup and TUI paths, but I did not run a live deleted-cwd TUI command in this read-only review.
commands.review_followup: - [P2] Manual review is needed because the remaining blockers combine contributor real-behavior proof, a dirty/conflicting branch, and fallback policy/security choices that automation cannot settle for the contributor.
